messages.title: Welcome to Frostgate
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to confirm your temporary housing deadline and review essential heating and transport costs. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Sableport
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to correct your address and work-document mismatch before accepting port work. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Dusk Harbor
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to verify lodging and a legally recognized work contact. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Aurora Spire
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to validate your credentials or book a provisional skills assessment. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Crescent Bay
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to secure affordable housing and identify reliable food-market access. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Glassfall
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to satisfy the address and deposit requirements without exhausting your emergency buffer. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Starfall
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to secure a recognized address for work, banking, and residency processing. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Emberhall
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to establish a bankable identity, address, and verified sponsor. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Ironhold
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to complete technical placement and confirm worker-housing eligibility. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.

messages.title: Welcome to Blacklight
messages.body: Your immediate priority is to establish verified digital identity while securing temporary physical housing. Protect your emergency buffer, verify every offer, and use the official recovery route if the first plan fails.
